basics.name: Anand Bhaskaran
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer | Technical Lead | Startup Mentor | MBA | AI
basics.summary: Proven technical leader with 10+ years’ experience architecting and delivering AI-powered, cloud-native enterprise platforms. Led end-to-end solutions serving millions, drove $1.5M+ in revenue, delivered scalable systems with >99.99% reliability, and mentored teams on strategy, adoption, and innovation while enabling measurable business value, automation, and sustainable technology evolution.

work.name: Beekeeper AG
work.summary: Technical Lead owning full lifecycle architectural design and delivery of enterprise-scale, AI-powered platforms, driving sustainable adoption of modern technologies and measurable business value for a platform serving millions.
highlights: Architected Employee Referral System with 99.99% SLA, generating $1.5M+ revenue and $500K ARR through reusable, business-critical capabilities.
Designed and delivered LLM-driven template translation system leveraging GitHub Actions and OpenAI APIs, translating 12K+ assets and saving $337K while accelerating global go-to-market.
Led architecture for distributed templating engine serving 10M+ users, reducing customer setup time by 90% and enabling scalable, reusable platform assets.
Drove GenAI demo template system design and implementation, automating personalized content from Salesforce data to boost demo efficiency and stakeholder engagement.
Revamped Search Platform, leading cross-functional teams to deliver scalable architecture that enhanced reliability, user engagement, and platform adoption.
Acted as deputy tech lead and technical hiring manager for AI, mentoring engineers, ensuring delivery of core modules, and driving architectural alignment.
Developed Agentic AI Onboarding specialist integrating multi-step reasoning for automated, scalable onboarding—providing personalized guidance to all users and significantly reducing time-to-value.

work.name: Tenity
work.summary: Panelist and technology mentor guiding startup founders on technical strategy, scalable architecture, and high-impact adoption of cloud and AI technologies.
highlights: Evaluated deep tech solutions for seed-to-VC startups, driving adoption of scalable technologies and enterprise-grade practices.
Mentored engineering teams at Opt Alpha to architect and scale high-frequency trading systems, optimizing platform performance and operational reliability.

work.name: Dronistics
work.summary: Founding Engineer responsible for end-to-end design and delivery of an autonomous, cloud-based drone delivery system used in over 500 last-mile deliveries.
highlights: Architected autonomous drone platform (Vue/Java/PostgreSQL), scaling to 500+ deliveries and enabling enterprise cloud deployments.
Delivered robust DevOps pipelines and cloud infrastructure powering enterprise partnerships and CES showcase operations.
Engineered real-time APIs and logistics algorithms, reducing delivery times by 40% and achieving a 99.5% safety record.

work.name: EPFL — Laboratory of Intelligent Systems (Robogen)
work.summary: Led engineering for Robogen, delivering open-source innovation in AI-driven, cloud-enabled robotics, and supporting research and teaching at EPFL.
highlights: Led architecture and engineering of Robogen, an AI robotics research platform enabling co-evolution of robot morphologies and control systems.
Directed AWS cloud migration, secured AWS Research Credits, and achieved global recognition via the AWS Research Blog.
Supervised 20+ master's students and contributed to curriculum as Teaching Assistant for Evolutionary Robotics.

education.institution: Quantic School of Business and Technology

publications.name: Agentic AI: Simple ReAct Agent
publications.summary: Technical tutorial series introducing practical implementation of ReAct (Reasoning + Acting) agents, demonstrating how to build autonomous AI systems that combine reasoning capabilities with actionable decision-making for real-world applications.

publications.name: From Infinite posibilites to finite Results
publications.publisher: AI for the rest of Us, UK (Talk)
publications.summary: Strategic framework presentation on transforming unlimited AI potential into measurable business outcomes through systematic implementation and practical constraint design.

publications.name: Designing Robots Through Artificial Evolution
publications.summary: Featured technical article showcasing breakthrough research in evolutionary robotics, demonstrating how AWS cloud infrastructure enables large-scale artificial evolution simulations for autonomous system design.

awards.title: TI India Analog Design Contest Winner

projects.name: PulseView - AI Market Intelligence
highlights: Developed and launched a real-time stock market analysis platform leveraging AI agents for explainable, reliable trading signals.
Integrated technical and news-based insights to deliver comprehensive, automated market intelligence for diverse stakeholders.
Took full ownership from concept to operationalization, scaling the platform from a personal tool to a public solution for retail investors.
Emphasized explainable AI, speed, and clarity to drive adoption and measurable business value in financial analysis workflows.

projects.name: Proplab - AI Real Estate Tools
highlights: Designed and delivered an MVP digitizing property inventory inspections, replacing manual, inefficient workflows with structured, image-backed, timestamped protocols.
Led architectural and technical strategy for building scalable, AI-driven tools such as an AI-powered marketing assistant automating listing creation and marketplace visibility.
Implemented automation and integration to optimize operational efficiency across business processes.
Demonstrated hands-on leadership and agile iteration from concept through deployment in a complex, multi-stakeholder environment.

projects.name: SwissNRI - Cross-border Fintech Platform
highlights: Identified critical regulatory and market needs, architected and built the first cross-border fintech SaaS platform for complex financial challenges facing Indian nationals in Switzerland.
Drove end-to-end, zero-to-one product development from concept through to MVP launch in 3 months, establishing scalable architecture and early user adoption.
Enabled compliance, automation, and secure integration across complex regulatory systems (FEMA, DTAA, Swiss financial regulations).
Set up continuous feedback loops and platform iteration, leading to a 40% increase in user satisfaction and demonstrable business value.

_jobApplication.jobTitle: Solution Architect – AI & firm-wide technology focus
